nodes.name: entities.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic models and dataclasses for migration entity extraction. Defines DocumentedChange and ExtractionResult dataclasses, enums (EntityKind, EntityRole, StepType, Effort, ScopeLevel, Severity), and Pydantic models (AffectedEntity, BreakingScopeInput, MigrationStep, MigrationEntity, MigrationEntitiesBatch). Also exports SOURCE_SECTION_TO_RULE_TYPE mapping.

nodes.name: DocumentedChange
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass representing one raw upstream change record before LLM filtering. Fields: type, confidence, source_url, statement, metadata.

nodes.name: ExtractionResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing the output of a framework HTTP extractor for one or more version hops. Fields: changes (list of DocumentedChange), metadata dict.

nodes.name: MigrationEntity
nodes.summary: Pydantic model representing a structured migration entity with source_section, title, jira_keys, change_type, reason, scopes, entities, steps, and subsystem fields.

nodes.name: MigrationEntitiesBatch
nodes.summary: Pydantic model wrapping a list of MigrationEntity objects as a batch.

nodes.name: MigrationStep
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a single migration step with index, step_type, summary, instruction, effort, automatable, requires, verification, and cli_operation.

nodes.name: AffectedEntity
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for an entity affected by a migration change. Fields: kind (EntityKind), name, role (EntityRole).

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Abstract base extractor and shared HTTP client infrastructure. Defines BaseExtractor ABC with async extract/discover_versions/extract_range methods, URL caching, GitHub release fetching, and GA version filter functions (is_jboss_ga_version, is_infinispan_ga_version, is_spring_boot_ga_version).

nodes.name: BaseExtractor
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all framework extractors. Provides async HTTP client (httpx), URL-level caching, fetch/fetch_json/fetch_first_ok/fetch_github_release helpers, and abstract discover_versions/extract methods. Also has extract_range and build_range_metadata hooks.

nodes.name: is_jboss_ga_version
nodes.summary: Returns True only for JBoss-ecosystem GA releases matching X.Y.Z.Final pattern. Used by WildFly, Hibernate ORM, RESTEasy, WildFly Elytron.

nodes.name: is_infinispan_ga_version
nodes.summary: Returns True for GA Infinispan releases, handling dual conventions: X.Y.Z.Final for versions < 16.x and plain X.Y.Z for 16.x and newer.

nodes.name: is_spring_boot_ga_version
nodes.summary: Returns True only for Spring Boot GA releases matching plain X.Y.Z with no suffix. Rejects milestone and RC builds.

nodes.name: parsing.py
nodes.summary: Shared parsing utilities for framework HTTP extractors. Provides version comparison/range/hop computation, Maven metadata XML parsing, POM dependency parsing, BOM diffing, GitHub release text parsing, Markdown statement parsing, AsciiDoc migration guide parsing, and HTML-to-text conversion.

nodes.name: parse_maven_metadata_versions
nodes.summary: Parses Maven metadata XML and returns a list of version strings.

nodes.name: versions_in_range
nodes.summary: Filters and orders a list of versions to those within a from/to range, validating presence of boundary versions.

nodes.name: compute_hops
nodes.summary: Returns consecutive (from, to) version hop pairs from an ordered list of versions.

nodes.name: parse_github_release_text
nodes.summary: Parses plain text from GitHub release HTML or API markdown into a list of DocumentedChange objects, classifying statements by section context.

nodes.name: parse_markdown_statements
nodes.summary: Parses Markdown bullet points under section headings into DocumentedChange objects with type/confidence classification.

nodes.name: parse_asciidoc_migration_guide
nodes.summary: Parses AsciiDoc-formatted migration guide content into DocumentedChange objects.

nodes.name: bom_diff
nodes.summary: Computes a diff between two sets of Maven BOM dependency maps, returning added/changed/removed lists.

nodes.name: parse_pom_dependencies
nodes.summary: Parses a Maven POM XML file's dependencyManagement section and returns a dict of coordinate to version.

nodes.name: html_to_text
nodes.summary: Converts HTML content to structured Markdown-like plain text using BeautifulSoup.

nodes.name: apply_cli_hints
nodes.summary: Upgrades DocumentedChange entries containing CLI subsystem patterns to mandatory_migration/confirmed type.

nodes.name: filters.py
nodes.summary: Shared pre-release version filters for Maven-based extractors. Re-exports is_jboss_ga_version and is_infinispan_ga_version from base.py and provides _skip_prerelease() function that checks JBOSS_SKIP_PRERELEASE env var and config.

nodes.name: _skip_prerelease
nodes.summary: Returns True when pre-release versions should be filtered out, reading from JBOSS_SKIP_PRERELEASE env var with fallback to config.JBOSS_SKIP_PRERELEASE.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Extractor registry module. Exports get_extractor() factory, supported_framework_keys(), render_raw_markdown(), FRAMEWORK_DISPLAY_NAMES, REGISTRY_KEYS, and the _EXTRACTOR_CLASSES dict mapping framework keys to extractor classes.

nodes.name: get_extractor
nodes.summary: Factory function that returns a new extractor instance for a given CLI framework key string. Raises ValueError for unknown keys.

nodes.name: render_raw_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a multi-hop raw Markdown document from extraction output, including a table of documented changes per hop.

nodes.name: stubs.py
nodes.summary: Defines StubExtractor base class that raises NotImplementedError for all methods. Concrete stub extractors (RESTEasy, Elytron) that have version discovery but no extract implementation inherit from this.

nodes.name: StubExtractor
nodes.summary: Base class for not-yet-implemented extractors. All methods raise NotImplementedError with a helpful message pointing to the pipeline doc.

nodes.name: stub_framework.py
nodes.summary: Test stub extractor for pipeline integration tests. Provides two hardcoded versions (1.0.0, 2.0.0) and returns synthetic breaking/behavioral DocumentedChange objects.

nodes.name: StubFrameworkExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete test extractor that inherits from BaseExtractor and returns synthetic changes for testing the pipeline without real HTTP calls.

nodes.name: spring_boot.py
nodes.summary: Spring Boot HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from Maven Central, fetches GitHub releases and wiki release notes, strips Dependency Upgrades sections, and generates BOM diff metadata via Spring Boot dependencies POM.

nodes.name: SpringBootExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for Spring Boot. Discovers versions from Maven Central, extracts from GitHub releases + wiki notes, and builds BOM diff range metadata.

nodes.name: angular.py
nodes.summary: Angular HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from the npm registry, fetches GitHub releases, augments with CHANGELOG.md sections, and collects blog insight summaries from Angular blog links found in release bodies.

nodes.name: AngularExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for Angular. Uses npm registry for version discovery, fetches GitHub releases and CHANGELOG.md, collects blog insights.

nodes.name: eap.py
nodes.summary: JBoss EAP HTTP extractor. Uses a static version table (EAP_VERSION_TABLE with EAPVersionEntry dataclass) to map EAP versions to Red Hat documentation slugs. Fetches migration guide and release notes HTML from Red Hat docs portal.

nodes.name: EAPExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for JBoss EAP. Version discovery returns static EAP version list; extract fetches HTML from Red Hat docs and applies CLI hints.

nodes.name: EAPVersionEntry
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass mapping an EAP version string to a Red Hat docs slug and a WildFly base version.

nodes.name: elytron.py
nodes.summary: WildFly Elytron extractor stub. Implements version discovery from Maven Central with JBoss GA filtering, but extract() raises NotImplementedError via StubExtractor.

nodes.name: ElytronExtractor
nodes.summary: Stub extractor for WildFly Elytron inheriting from StubExtractor. Version discovery implemented via Maven Central; extract() not implemented.

nodes.name: hibernate.py
nodes.summary: Hibernate ORM HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from Maven Central with JBoss GA filtering, fetches AsciiDoc migration guides for v6+ or GitHub release notes for older versions.

nodes.name: HibernateExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for Hibernate ORM. Uses Maven Central for version discovery with GA filtering; fetches AsciiDoc migration guides for v6+, GitHub releases for older.

nodes.name: infinispan.py
nodes.summary: Infinispan HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from Maven Central with Infinispan-specific GA filtering (handles dual version conventions for pre/post 16.x), fetches GitHub releases.

nodes.name: InfinispanExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for Infinispan. Uses Maven Central for version discovery with Infinispan GA filtering; fetches GitHub releases.

nodes.name: jakarta_ee.py
nodes.summary: Jakarta EE namespace migration extractor (no HTTP). Uses a static version list and hardcoded NAMESPACE_MAPPINGS to generate mandatory_migration changes when crossing the EE9 javax→jakarta boundary.

nodes.name: JakartaEEExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for Jakarta EE namespace migration. No HTTP calls; generates namespace migration changes when the version hop crosses the EE9 boundary.

nodes.name: JakartaEENamespaceMapping
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass mapping a javax package to its jakarta replacement package and the EE spec version in which it was renamed.

nodes.name: resteasy.py
nodes.summary: RESTEasy extractor stub. Implements version discovery from Maven Central with JBoss GA filtering, but extract() raises NotImplementedError via StubExtractor.

nodes.name: RestEasyExtractor
nodes.summary: Stub extractor for RESTEasy inheriting from StubExtractor. Version discovery implemented via Maven Central; extract() not implemented.

nodes.name: test_angular.py
nodes.summary: Tests for AngularExtractor. Mocks npm registry and GitHub API responses to verify release body parsing and blog_insights metadata structure.

nodes.name: test_eap.py
nodes.summary: Tests for EAPExtractor. Mocks Red Hat documentation HTML responses and verifies CLI subsystem hints are detected as mandatory_migration.

nodes.name: test_elytron.py
nodes.summary: Tests for ElytronExtractor stub. Verifies that calling extract() raises NotImplementedError matching the WildFly Elytron display name.

nodes.name: test_hibernate.py
nodes.summary: Tests for HibernateExtractor. Mocks Maven metadata and AsciiDoc migration guide responses to verify AsciiDoc parsing produces at least one change.

nodes.name: test_infinispan.py
nodes.summary: Tests for InfinispanExtractor. Mocks Maven metadata and GitHub release API to verify release body parsing produces changes.

nodes.name: test_jakarta_ee.py
nodes.summary: Tests for JakartaEEExtractor. Covers the EE9 boundary crossing (8.0.0→9.0.0), no-op when both versions >= 9.0.0, and no-op when both versions < 9.0.0.

nodes.name: test_registry.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the extractor registry (__init__.py). Verifies instantiation of all nine framework keys, unknown key error handling, stub extractor NotImplementedError behavior, and supported keys count.

nodes.name: test_resteasy.py
nodes.summary: Tests for RestEasyExtractor stub. Verifies that calling extract() raises NotImplementedError matching the RESTEasy display name.

nodes.name: test_spring_boot.py
nodes.summary: Tests for SpringBootExtractor. Mocks Maven metadata, GitHub release API, and wiki page responses to verify release body parsing and change type classification.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Loads all runtime configuration from environment variables at import time, providing Neo4j credentials, model provider settings, rate-limit tuning, and feature flags with sensible defaults.

nodes.name: ConfigurationError
nodes.summary: Custom ValueError raised when a required environment variable is missing or empty.

nodes.name: driver.py
nodes.summary: Implements a lazy singleton Neo4j driver with context-manager helpers for read and write sessions.

nodes.name: DriverNotInitialisedError
nodes.summary: RuntimeError subclass raised when session helpers are invoked after the driver has been closed.

nodes.name: get_driver
nodes.summary: Returns the module-level Neo4j driver singleton, initialising it on first call.

nodes.name: read_session
nodes.summary: Context manager that yields a read-only Neo4j session.

nodes.name: write_session
nodes.summary: Context manager that yields a write-access Neo4j session.

nodes.name: close_driver
nodes.summary: Closes and dereferences the global driver singleton.

nodes.name: indexes.py
nodes.summary: Declares all Neo4j index and constraint DDL statements and applies them idempotently via ensure_indexes.

nodes.name: ensure_indexes
nodes.summary: Iterates all DDL statements and applies each to Neo4j, logging warnings for any that fail.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package marker for Cypher query helpers.

nodes.name: pipeline.py
nodes.summary: Provides Cypher query helpers for Version node management and pipeline artifact path tracking.

nodes.name: PipelineRunRecord
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass representing a Version node's pipeline artifact paths.

nodes.name: merge_version
nodes.summary: MERGE-upserts a Version node by framework and version string.

nodes.name: upsert_version_artifact_paths
nodes.summary: Ensures a Version node exists and sets its artifact paths in one operation.

nodes.name: list_pipeline_runs
nodes.summary: Queries all Version nodes that have artifact paths set and returns them as a list.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel module that re-exports all public model types from entities and graph sub-modules.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Defines read-model dataclasses for graph node types (Version, MigrationRule, MigrationStep, BreakingScope, MigrationContext) and the sortable_version utility function.

nodes.name: VersionNode
nodes.summary: Read-model dataclass representing a Version node.

nodes.name: MigrationRuleNode
nodes.summary: Read-model dataclass for a MigrationRule graph node.

nodes.name: MigrationContextNode
nodes.summary: Read-model dataclass representing a MigrationContext node.

nodes.name: sortable_version
nodes.summary: Converts a semantic version string into a sortable integer via major*1_000_000 + minor*1_000 + patch.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package marker for the pipeline-core module.

nodes.name: populator.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrates writing a MigrationEntitiesBatch to Neo4j: ensures indexes, merges Version and MigrationRule nodes, writes MigrationStep and BreakingScope nodes idempotently.

nodes.name: PopulationResult
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass summarising the outcome of a populate_graph call.

nodes.name: UnknownSourceSectionError
nodes.summary: ValueError subclass raised when a MigrationEntity carries an unknown source_section.

nodes.name: populate_graph
nodes.summary: Entry-point for batch graph population with dry-run and idempotency guards.

nodes.name: _write_entity
nodes.summary: Writes a single MigrationEntity to Neo4j: upserts MigrationRule, links BreakingScope, writes MigrationStep nodes.

nodes.name: _write_step
nodes.summary: Upserts a MigrationStep node and creates AFFECTS_* edges for remove/replace/rename step types.

nodes.name: _write_affected_entity
nodes.summary: Merges an affected entity node and creates lifecycle edges back to the Version node.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: pytest conftest providing an autouse fixture that sets required NEO4J_* environment variables.

nodes.name: test_config.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the config module covering missing/empty required vars and type coercion.

nodes.name: test_indexes.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for ensure_indexes verifying all DDL statements are executed and partial failures do not halt iteration.

nodes.name: test_models.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for Pydantic entity models and graph value objects.

nodes.name: test_smoke.py
nodes.summary: Integration smoke test connecting to a live Neo4j instance to verify all expected constraints are applied.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: pytest conftest for pipeline-core tests providing env var fixtures.

nodes.name: test_populator_helpers.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for derive_entity_classification covering actionable/incomplete/informational outcomes.

nodes.name: test_populator_idempotency.py
nodes.summary: Idempotency test for populate_graph using an in-memory FakeSession that replicates Cypher MERGE semantics.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer marking migration_oracle as a Python package with no public re-exports.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Click CLI entry point that wires the full export-extract-populate-framework pipeline command, orchestrating extraction, LLM filtering, entity extraction, and optional graph population with cache-flag and force-flag support.

nodes.name: _validate_model_provider
nodes.summary: Guards the pipeline command from running LLM steps when MODEL_PROVIDER is not configured, raising a ClickException with a human-readable message.

nodes.name: pipeline
nodes.summary: Core Click command implementing the export-extract-populate-framework pipeline: resolves cache flags, runs async HTTP extraction, invokes the filter and entity-extraction LLM steps, and optionally populates the Neo4j graph.

nodes.name: _cache.py
nodes.summary: Provides the CacheFlags dataclass and resolve_cache_flags function, which compute skip/reuse decisions for all three pipeline stages based on artifact existence on disk and force-flag combinations.

nodes.name: CacheFlags
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass holding six boolean skip/warning flags that represent the resolved caching decisions for a single pipeline run.

nodes.name: resolve_cache_flags
nodes.summary: Computes CacheFlags by evaluating artifact file existence against force/force-extract/force-llm flag combinations.

nodes.name: is_cached
nodes.summary: Returns True if an artifact file already exists on disk.

nodes.name: mark_cached
nodes.summary: Writes artifact content to disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: _llm.py
nodes.summary: LLM service layer providing a LangChain provider factory (get_llm), retry-aware invocation (invoke_with_retry), and response-cleaning helpers used by both the filter and entity-extraction pipeline steps.

nodes.name: LLMInvocationError
nodes.summary: Custom RuntimeError subclass raised when an LLM invocation fails after all retries.

nodes.name: get_llm
nodes.summary: Factory function returning a LangChain BaseChatModel configured for the MODEL_PROVIDER setting.

nodes.name: invoke_with_retry
nodes.summary: Invokes a LangChain chat model with exponential backoff on rate-limit errors up to EXTRACTION_RATE_LIMIT_RETRIES attempts.

nodes.name: strip_markdown_fences
nodes.summary: Strips wrapping triple-backtick markdown/md fences from LLM responses.

nodes.name: strip_preamble
nodes.summary: Removes conversational preamble before the first severity section heading.

nodes.name: _paths.py
nodes.summary: Artifact path helpers that define the runs/ directory structure and expose path generators and a directory initialization utility.

nodes.name: ensure_runs_directories
nodes.summary: Creates the runs/raw, runs/nodes, and runs/json directories or raises an OSError if any cannot be created.

nodes.name: extractor.py
nodes.summary: Entity-extraction orchestrator that converts filtered Markdown into a validated MigrationEntitiesBatch JSON via a structured LLM call or text-based fallback.

nodes.name: ExtractionResult
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass holding the validated MigrationEntitiesBatch and the artifact Path for a completed entity-extraction run.

nodes.name: run_extraction
nodes.summary: Entry point for the entity-extraction step: reads cached JSON when flags allow, otherwise invokes the structured LLM call.

nodes.name: _invoke_structured
nodes.summary: Attempts structured LLM output via with_structured_output, falling back to raw invoke_with_retry and JSON parsing.

nodes.name: filters.py
nodes.summary: LLM filter pipeline step that converts raw changelog Markdown tables into a structured, severity-categorized Markdown document.

nodes.name: FilterResult
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass holding the filtered Markdown string and the artifact Path for a completed filter run.

nodes.name: run_filter
nodes.summary: Executes the filter LLM step: returns cached filtered Markdown when flags allow, otherwise invokes the LLM.

nodes.name: emit_stale_warnings
nodes.summary: Prints stderr warnings when --force-extract was used but cached LLM artifacts will be reused.

nodes.name: test_cache.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for resolve_cache_flags covering JSON-cache skips, filtered-MD-cache skips, and force-extract stale warnings.

nodes.name: test_cli_cache_and_extract_only.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the CLI cache skip behaviour and --extract-only flag.

nodes.name: test_quickstart.py
nodes.summary: Quickstart integration test that exercises the full dry-run CLI path with mocked filter and entity-extraction steps.

nodes.name: wildfly.py
nodes.summary: Implements the WildFlyExtractor, an async HTTP extractor that discovers WildFly versions from Maven Central, fetches GitHub release notes, and enriches parsed changes with Jira issue metadata via concurrent async requests.

nodes.name: WildFlyExtractor
nodes.summary: Concrete extractor for WildFly that extends BaseExtractor, providing version discovery from Maven metadata, GitHub release-note parsing, and Jira-based change enrichment with configurable concurrency.

nodes.name: discover_versions
nodes.summary: Fetches and normalizes all WildFly release versions from Maven Central metadata XML, optionally filtering out pre-release and non-GA versions.

nodes.name: enrich_with_jira
nodes.summary: Synchronously enriches a list of DocumentedChange objects by replacing Jira-key placeholders with full issue summaries, descriptions, and priority metadata sourced from a pre-built Jira cache.

nodes.name: _load_jira_cache
nodes.summary: Concurrently fetches Jira issue data for all keys found in a release body and change statements, using a semaphore to limit concurrent requests.

nodes.name: extract
nodes.summary: Main extraction entry point: fetches the release body for a WildFly version hop, parses changes, performs Jira enrichment, and returns an ExtractionResult.

nodes.name: _fetch_release_body
nodes.summary: Resolves the release body text for a given WildFly version by trying GitHub releases, then the official migration guide HTML, with a news-page fallback.

nodes.name: wildfly_jira.py
nodes.summary: Provides standalone Jira enrichment helpers for WildFly, including regex-based Jira key extraction, REST and HTML scraping fetch logic, and result parsing into typed cache entries.

nodes.name: normalize_jira_url
nodes.summary: Rewrites legacy issues.redhat.com Jira browse URLs to the current redhat.atlassian.net domain.

nodes.name: build_release_index
nodes.summary: Scans a release body for all Jira key references (plain and HTML-export formats) and builds an index mapping each key to a stub WildFlyJiraEntry.

nodes.name: collect_jira_keys
nodes.summary: Collects the union of all Jira keys found in a release body and a list of change statement strings.

nodes.name: parse_jira_fields
nodes.summary: Converts a raw Jira REST API fields dict into a typed WildFlyJiraEntry with normalized summary, description, issue type, and priority.

nodes.name: fetch_jira_entry
nodes.summary: Async function that fetches a Jira issue entry by first trying the REST API JSON endpoint, then falling back to HTML scraping of the browse URL using BeautifulSoup.

nodes.name: enrich_with_jira
nodes.summary: Async compatibility shim that drives the full Jira enrichment pipeline via an extractor instance; used by legacy callers and tests.

nodes.name: test_wildfly.py
nodes.summary: Integration test for WildFlyExtractor.extract that mocks Maven metadata, GitHub releases, and the Jira REST API with respx to verify end-to-end change extraction.

nodes.name: test_wildfly_jira.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the WildFly Jira enrichment helpers, covering Jira key collection from release bodies and the full enrich_with_jira pipeline with mocked HTTP responses.

nodes.name: extensions.yml
nodes.summary: Spec Kit extensions registry declaring installed extensions (agent-context, git) and the full lifecycle hook schedule that wires git commits and agent-context updates around every core command.

nodes.name: feature.json
nodes.summary: Tracks the currently active Spec Kit feature directory, pointing to the 003-framework-http-extractors spec.

nodes.name: init-options.json
nodes.summary: Records Spec Kit initialization options including AI integration target (claude-code), branch numbering strategy (sequential), and the installed speckit version (0.9.2.dev0).

nodes.name: integration.json
nodes.summary: Manages multi-integration state for Spec Kit, listing installed integrations (cursor-agent, claude-code) and designating claude-code as the active default integration.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Spec Kit coding-agent-context extension explaining how it manages the CLAUDE.md (or equivalent) instruction file, its configurable markers, available commands, and how to disable it.

nodes.name: agent-context-config.yml
nodes.summary: Runtime configuration for the agent-context extension specifying the target context file (CLAUDE.md) and the start/end delimiter markers used to demarcate the Spec Kit managed section.

nodes.name: extension.yml
nodes.summary: Extension manifest for the agent-context Spec Kit extension, declaring its provided commands (speckit.agent-context.update), lifecycle hooks (after_specify, after_plan), metadata, and version requirements.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Spec Kit git extension covering its five commands (initialize, feature, validate, remote, commit), the full hook schedule, configuration options, and cross-platform script inventory.

nodes.name: config-template.yml
nodes.summary: Canonical template for git-config.yml defining branch numbering strategy, init commit message, and per-lifecycle-hook auto-commit toggles with customizable messages; copied to git-config.yml on extension install.

nodes.name: extension.yml
nodes.summary: Extension manifest for the Spec Kit git extension declaring its five provided commands, the full before/after lifecycle hook bindings, required external tools (git), and default configuration values.

nodes.name: git-config.yml
nodes.summary: Active runtime configuration for the git extension controlling branch numbering strategy (sequential), initial commit message, and all per-event auto-commit enable/message settings (all disabled by default).

nodes.name: speckit.git.commit.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for the auto-commit hook that stages and commits all changes when invoked around a Spec Kit lifecycle event, using per-event enable flags and messages from git-config.yml.

nodes.name: speckit.git.feature.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for feature branch creation, detailing sequential vs timestamp numbering resolution, short-name generation heuristics, script invocation, and the GIT_BRANCH_NAME environment variable override.

nodes.name: speckit.git.initialize.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for Git repository initialization, covering script invocation, fallback commands, customization hooks, and graceful degradation when Git is unavailable.

nodes.name: speckit.git.remote.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for detecting the Git remote URL and extracting GitHub owner and repository name for issue-creation integration, with graceful degradation when no remote is configured.

nodes.name: speckit.git.validate.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for validating the current branch against sequential (NNN-) and timestamp (YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-) naming patterns and confirming the corresponding spec directory exists under specs/.

nodes.name: auto-commit.sh
nodes.summary: Git extension script that automatically stages and commits changes after a Spec Kit lifecycle event, reading per-event enable/message configuration from git-config.yml.

nodes.name: create-new-feature.sh
nodes.summary: Extension-layer script that creates a sequentially or timestamp-numbered git feature branch, sourcing git-common.sh for shared utilities.

nodes.name: git-common.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal shared library of git-specific helpers for the git extension: has_git detection, effective-branch-name normalisation, and feature-branch pattern validation.

nodes.name: initialize-repo.sh
nodes.summary: Git extension script that initialises a new git repository with an initial commit, reading the commit message from git-config.yml.

nodes.name: _find_project_root
nodes.summary: Walks parent directories to locate the project root by finding a .specify or .git marker directory.

nodes.name: get_highest_from_specs
nodes.summary: Scans the specs/ directory for sequentially-numbered subdirectories and returns the highest numeric prefix.

nodes.name: check_existing_branches
nodes.summary: Combines the highest numbers from specs directory and git branches to return the next available sequential branch number.

nodes.name: has_git
nodes.summary: Returns true when git is installed and the given directory is inside a valid git work tree.

nodes.name: check_feature_branch
nodes.summary: Validates that a branch name matches the Spec Kit sequential or timestamp feature branch pattern.

nodes.name: _find_project_root
nodes.summary: Walks parent directories to locate the project root.

nodes.name: auto-commit.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell equivalent of auto-commit.sh: stages and commits changes after a Spec Kit lifecycle event.

nodes.name: create-new-feature.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell equivalent of the bash create-new-feature script: computes sequential or timestamp-prefixed branch names.

nodes.name: git-common.ps1
nodes.summary: Minimal PowerShell library providing Test-HasGit, Get-SpecKitEffectiveBranchName, and Test-FeatureBranch.

nodes.name: initialize-repo.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that initialises a git repository with an initial commit.

nodes.name: Get-HighestNumberFromSpecs
nodes.summary: Scans the specs/ directory for sequentially-numbered subdirectories and returns the highest numeric prefix.

nodes.name: Get-NextBranchNumber
nodes.summary: Combines specs-directory and git-branch highest numbers to return the next available sequential branch number.

nodes.name: Test-HasGit
nodes.summary: Returns true when .git exists at the repo root, git is installed, and the directory is a valid git work tree.

nodes.name: Test-FeatureBranch
nodes.summary: Validates that a branch name matches the Spec Kit sequential or timestamp feature branch pattern.

nodes.name: claude-code.manifest.json
nodes.summary: Installation manifest for the Spec Kit claude-code integration (v0.9.2.dev0), recording install timestamp and SHA-256 checksums of deployed SKILL.md files.

nodes.name: cursor-agent.manifest.json
nodes.summary: Installation manifest for the Spec Kit cursor-agent integration (v0.9.2.dev0), recording SHA-256 checksums of deployed Cursor skill files.

nodes.name: speckit.manifest.json
nodes.summary: Installation manifest for the core speckit integration (v0.9.2.dev0), recording checksums of core bash scripts and templates installed under .specify/.

nodes.name: check-prerequisites.sh
nodes.summary: Unified prerequisite checker for the SDD workflow: validates the feature branch name and outputs a payload listing available documents.

nodes.name: common.sh
nodes.summary: Core shared library for all Spec Kit bash scripts: project-root discovery, git detection, feature-directory resolution, branch validation, template resolution with preset/extension composition strategies.

nodes.name: create-new-feature.sh
nodes.summary: Core script that creates a numbered git feature branch and initialises the specs/ directory with a scaffold spec.md.

nodes.name: setup-plan.sh
nodes.summary: Sets up the implementation plan file for the active feature by copying the plan-template into the feature directory.

nodes.name: setup-tasks.sh
nodes.summary: Validates that spec.md and plan.md exist, resolves the tasks template, and outputs paths for the tasks generation step.

nodes.name: find_specify_root
nodes.summary: Walks parent directories upward to find the nearest directory containing a .specify folder.

nodes.name: get_repo_root
nodes.summary: Resolves the repository root by preferring the .specify marker over git.

nodes.name: get_feature_paths
nodes.summary: Resolves all standard feature artifact paths using env override, feature.json, and branch-prefix lookup.

nodes.name: resolve_template
nodes.summary: Resolves a template name to a file path by searching project overrides, installed presets, extension templates, and core templates.

nodes.name: resolve_template_content
nodes.summary: Resolves a template name to composed content by collecting all matching layers and applying prepend/append/wrap/replace composition strategies.

nodes.name: check_feature_branch
nodes.summary: Validates that the current branch name matches the Spec Kit sequential or timestamp feature branch pattern.

nodes.name: checklist-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit checklist template providing a numbered task-checklist scaffold that the /speckit-checklist command fills in with feature-specific items derived from spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md.

nodes.name: constitution-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit constitution template defining placeholder sections for core project principles, governance rules, and amendment policies that the /speckit-constitution command instantiates for a specific project.

nodes.name: plan-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit implementation plan template providing structure for technical context, constitution checks, project directory layout, and complexity tracking that the /speckit-plan command populates for a feature branch.

nodes.name: spec-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit feature specification template with prioritized user story structure, BDD acceptance scenarios, functional requirements, key entities, success criteria, and assumptions that the /speckit-specify command instantiates.

nodes.name: tasks-template.md
nodes.summary: Spec Kit task list template organizing implementation work into phased, user-story-aligned tasks with parallel execution markers, dependency ordering, and incremental delivery checkpoints that the /speckit-tasks command populates.

nodes.name: SPEC_ORGANIZATION.md
nodes.summary: Master spec sequencing index for the Migration Oracle project, documenting the six spec IDs (000-005), their dependency graph, per-spec completion gates, SpecKit runbook locations, and working conventions such as OPTIONAL MATCH usage and artifact path ownership.

nodes.name: export-extract-populate-framework-pipeline.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference for the export-extract-populate-framework CLI command covering all seven pipeline phases (version resolution, upstream extraction, Jira enrichment, raw Markdown rendering, LLM filter-and-group, LLM entity extraction, and optional graph write), caching strategy, force flags, environment variables, and all nine supported frameworks.

nodes.name: extractor-research-report.md
nodes.summary: Research report documenting critical bugs and spec deviations found in the WildFly, Spring Boot, and Angular extractors, including silent omission of canonical migration sources, Jira enrichment defects, and pre-release filter gaps, with a prioritized action-item list.

nodes.name: graph-mcp-skills-and-paysafe-resolution.md
nodes.summary: Complete operational reference for the Neo4j/Memgraph knowledge graph schema, all MCP tool contracts (primary v2 and legacy servers), Cypher queries, skill resources, Paysafe internal dependency resolution via FindIt and GitLab, and environment variable configuration.

nodes.name: legacy_graph_structure.md
nodes.summary: Legacy Spring Boot version graph schema reference documenting the original node types (Version, MigrationRule, CommunityInsight, ApplicationProperty, Class, Dependency, OpenRewriteRecipe), their properties, and the full relationship catalog including AUTOMATED_BY edge schema with confidence scoring.

nodes.name: migration-oracle-redesign.md
nodes.summary: Canonical full-system redesign specification for the Migration Oracle, introducing MigrationStep and BreakingScope nodes, role-tagged entity references, MigrationContext for stateful execution tracking, a revised LLM extraction schema (MigrationEntitiesBatch), new MCP tools, and a four-loop agent harness.

nodes.name: 000-foundations.md
nodes.summary: Defines the inter-module contract for the foundations spec: strict import rules, graph-write access boundaries, error type ownership, and downstream delegation rules that all later specs must follow.

nodes.name: data-model.md
nodes.summary: Verbatim reference for all Pydantic models, enums, graph dataclasses, the sortable_version utility, every environment variable with defaults, and the complete Neo4j/Memgraph index DDL table for the foundations layer.

nodes.name: plan.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the foundations spec covering file layout, module design decisions (singleton driver, lazy config, index idempotency), technology choices, and test strategy for the migration_oracle core package.

nodes.name: quickstart.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step local setup guide for the foundations spec: installing dependencies with uv, setting required environment variables, running unit tests without a live database, and executing the smoke test against a real Neo4j or Memgraph instance.

nodes.name: runbook.md
nodes.summary: Operator runbook with copy-paste SpecKit prompts, post-step gap reviews, and recovery prompts for every phase of implementing the foundations spec, from /speckit.specify through /speckit.implement.

nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Feature specification for the foundations layer, describing the purpose, components (models, config, driver, indexes), key behavioral contracts, integration constraints, error cases, and edge cases for the migration_oracle core package.

nodes.name: tasks.md
nodes.summary: Ordered implementation task list for the foundations spec organized into five phases (project scaffold, core modules, graph layer, tests, smoke validation) with parallelism markers, acceptance criteria, and explicit deliverable file paths.

nodes.name: data-model.md
nodes.summary: Defines the intermediate and output data types for the pipeline-core feature, including FilterResult, ExtractionResult, PopulationResult, PipelineRunRecord, the REPLACED_BY cross-product derivation rule, artifact key format, and retry constants.

nodes.name: plan.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the pipeline-core feature detailing module responsibilities, tech choices, LLM provider factory design, artifact caching conditions, structured output fallback, entityClassification derivation, and the runs/ directory layout.

nodes.name: quickstart.md
nodes.summary: Quick local-run guide for the pipeline-core feature covering required environment variables, dry-run invocation with the CLI entry point, artifact verification, and how to bypass the artifact cache with --force-llm.

nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Feature specification for the pipeline-core module with three user stories (process framework changes, idempotent graph population, dry-run and caching), 18 numbered functional requirements, and measurable success criteria.

nodes.name: tasks.md
nodes.summary: Ordered implementation task list for pipeline-core organized into six phases (setup, foundational, US1, US2, US3, polish) with 30 numbered tasks, parallelism markers, user story annotations, and explicit checkpoint gates between phases.

nodes.name: verification-protocol.md
nodes.summary: Eight-level end-to-end verification protocol for pipeline-core, progressing from static import checks and CLI structure through artifact cache validation, graph connection tests, full dry-run, live graph write, idempotency proof, and --skip-existing behavior.

nodes.name: data-model.md
nodes.summary: Defines the data model for the framework HTTP extractors feature, specifying DocumentedChange, ExtractionResult, WildFlyJiraEntry, WildFlyJiraIndex, EAPVersionEntry, and JakartaEENamespaceMapping types along with the URL-level cache contract.

nodes.name: plan.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for nine framework HTTP extractors, detailing project structure, technical decisions (async httpx, AsciiDoc parsing, Maven XML handling), extractor contracts, and parallel implementation order.

nodes.name: quickstart.md
nodes.summary: Quick reference for running individual extractors in isolation, the full CLI dry-run, extractor tests, and relevant environment variables.

nodes.name: research.md
nodes.summary: Records four technical decisions made during planning: custom regex AsciiDoc parsing, httpx.AsyncClient for WildFly Jira, stdlib ElementTree for Maven XML, and html.parser for BeautifulSoup.

nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Feature specification for nine framework HTTP extractors covering three user stories, fourteen functional requirements, and four measurable success criteria.

nodes.name: tasks.md
nodes.summary: Fully checked-off task list for the framework extractors feature, organized in six phases from setup through polish, with 30 tasks.

nodes.name: verification-protocol.md
nodes.summary: Eight-level runnable verification protocol for the framework HTTP extractors, covering static imports through edge-case paths.

nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Amendment specification for adding pre-release version filters to four Maven-based extractors and Spring Boot, defining three shared filter functions in base.py.

nodes.name: verification-protocol.md
nodes.summary: Four-level verification protocol for the pre-release filter amendment.

nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Amendment specification correcting silent data-loss bugs and content-source gaps across Spring Boot, Angular, and WildFly extractors.

nodes.name: verification-protocol.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive verification protocol for the 003b improvements amendment, spanning static AST checks through edge-case path checks.

nodes.name: settings.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code project-level settings enabling the Understand-Anything marketplace plugin from GitHub for knowledge-graph-based codebase analysis.

nodes.summary: Skill definition for extracting migration-impacting changes from framework changelogs into a structured JSON array of entities.

nodes.summary: Skill definition for Phase 5 (filter-and-group) of the Migration Oracle pipeline: transforms a raw migration table into a severity-ordered Markdown report.

nodes.summary: Skill for refreshing the managed Spec Kit section in the active coding agent context file by reading agent-context-config.yml.

nodes.summary: Read-only cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis skill for spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md.

nodes.summary: Skill for generating custom requirements-quality checklists that validate completeness, clarity, consistency, and coverage.

nodes.summary: Skill for creating or updating the project constitution at .specify/memory/constitution.md.

nodes.summary: Skill for auto-committing Spec Kit changes as a hook, reading per-event configuration from git-config.yml.

nodes.summary: Skill for creating and switching to a new sequential- or timestamp-numbered git feature branch for a specification.

nodes.summary: Skill for executing the two-phase implementation planning workflow: Phase 0 researches unknowns, Phase 1 extracts entities into data-model.md.

nodes.summary: Expert Spec-Driven Development assistant skill covering the full SpecKit lifecycle.

nodes.summary: Spec Kit clarify skill that drives interactive ambiguity-reduction sessions on a feature spec, asking up to 5 targeted questions and encoding answers back into the spec file.

nodes.summary: Spec Kit constitution skill that creates or updates the project constitution from principle inputs, ensuring all dependent templates remain in sync.

nodes.summary: Spec Kit git-commit skill that auto-stages and commits all changes after a Spec Kit command completes, driven by event-based hook configuration.

nodes.name: changes.py
nodes.summary: Public re-export shim for DocumentedChange and ExtractionResult, providing a stable import surface for extractor consumers without exposing the full entities module.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure re-export pattern using __all__ — no logic, just a public API alias for migration_oracle.models.entities.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer for the migration_oracle.graph namespace, making the directory a Python package without exposing any public symbols.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Project build configuration for migration-oracle using hatchling, declaring 13 runtime dependencies (neo4j, pydantic, httpx, langchain, etc.), 4 dev dependencies, and two CLI entry points for the migration pipeline.

nodes.name: run_003b_verification.py
nodes.summary: Multi-level verification script for the 003b extractor improvements spec, testing extractor imports, CLI flags, logic correctness, and live HTTP extraction.

nodes.name: run_raw_extractions.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that runs raw-only extraction for Angular, Spring Boot, and twelve WildFly major version hops using the migration-oracle CLI.

nodes.name: split_wildfly_raw.py
nodes.summary: Utility script that splits a multi-hop WildFly raw Markdown artifact into per-major-version-range files.

nodes.name: parse_hops
nodes.summary: Parses a multi-hop WildFly Markdown file and returns a list of (from_version, to_version, section_body) tuples.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that reads the combined WildFly source file, groups hops into major-version ranges, and writes one output Markdown file per range.

nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for extracting migration-impacting changes from framework changelog documents.

nodes.name: migration-filter.skill
nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for filtering, deduplicating, and categorizing raw migration change records.

nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for Spec Kit SDD buddy assistance during software design document authoring.

nodes.name: verification-protocol-writer.skill
nodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for writing structured verification protocol documents from feature specs.

nodes.summary: Empty package initializer making test_000_foundations a Python package discoverable by pytest.

nodes.name: test_driver.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test suite verifying the Neo4j driver singleton lifecycle: get_driver() returns the same instance, close_driver() resets the singleton.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Pytest conftest providing the anyio_backend fixture set to asyncio for all async extractor tests.

nodes.summary: Boundary contract document for the framework HTTP extractor subsystem, defining 6 rules including the public extract() interface and no circular imports.

nodes.summary: Coding agent context file that instructs Claude Code to read the feature plan at specs/003-framework-http-extractors/plan.md for project structure and technology context.

nodes.summary: Legacy extractor registry module defining ExtractorSpec dataclass, EXTRACTORS dict, and helper functions get_extractor and render_raw_markdown. Predates the pipeline/extractors rewrite.
